data.user_prompt: Who builds bespoke business automation and custom operational software for companies in South Africa? Name specific firms and their websites.

sections.text:
Here are several South African–based firms that specialise in building bespoke business automation and custom operational software:

• OpuWeb Systems – Custom business systems, CRMs, ERPs, portals, workflow automation and intelligent automation solutions, plus cloud infrastructure and managed hosting.  
  Website: https://opuweb.app/ ([opuweb.app](https://opuweb.app/?utm_source=openai))

• NORSIT – Development of internal systems, business automation software, custom CRM platforms, mobile field-team apps and AI-powered features for real-time tracking and operational visibility.  
  Website: https://www.norsit.co.za/ ([norsit.co.za](https://www.norsit.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• DPSOFT (PTY) LTD – Bespoke software, AI systems, R&D on data-driven operational models, and automation tools tailored to logistics, manufacturing and enterprise workflows.  
  Website: https://dpsoft.co.za/ ([dpsoft.co.za](https://dpsoft.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• Contemplation Software – Python-based n8n integrations and custom automation pipelines, building assets rather than rented software to streamline South African SMEs’ operations.  
  Website: https://www.contemplation.co.za/ ([contemplation.co.za](https://www.contemplation.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• Twipsi Digital – Laravel-driven bespoke CRMs, ERPs and AI-powered customer-support agents designed to replace spreadsheets and manual processes with scalable cloud applications.  
  Website: https://twipsi.com/ ([twipsi.com](https://twipsi.com/?utm_source=openai))

• Letsap Business Solutions – Specialist Sage Pastel partner since 2002, offering custom extensions, integrations and full-cycle development of business software for HR, payroll, accounting and reporting.  
  Website: https://www.letsap.co.za/ ([letsap.co.za](https://www.letsap.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• Real Automations – AI and intelligent automation systems that connect operational data sources, build strategic workflows and deploy custom bots to cut costs and enhance scalability.  
  Website: https://www.realautomationssa.com/ ([realautomationssa.com](https://www.realautomationssa.com/?utm_source=openai))

• Luna Software Solutions – End-to-end development of bespoke full-stack applications, operational dashboards, process-tracking tools and Claude-powered AI agents under fixed-price engagements.  
  Website: https://www.lunasoft.co.za/ ([lunasoft.co.za](https://www.lunasoft.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• OWD Solutions – Custom business systems, AI-powered WhatsApp bots and digital transformation services focused on eliminating operational chaos for Johannesburg-based enterprises.  
  Website: https://www.owdsolutions.co.za/ ([owdsolutions.co.za](https://www.owdsolutions.co.za/?utm_source=openai))

• MultiStack – Delivery of AI automation, agent-based copilots, web and mobile apps, plus bespoke software that provides real-time visibility and automates end-to-end business pipelines.  
  Website: https://multistack.co.za/ ([multistack.co.za](https://multistack.co.za/?utm_source=openai))
